name: Trade-In & Consignment Lead Intake
description: Qualify leads looking to trade in or consign their current boat
public_description: Thinking about trading in or selling your boat? Share a few details and we'll get back to you with options.

questions.label: What are you looking to do?
options: Trade in toward a new boat
Trade in toward a pre-owned boat

questions.label: What is the year, make, and model of your current boat?
How would you describe the overall condition?
Does the boat have any known mechanical issues?
Does the sale include a trailer?
How soon are you looking to move forward?
Any upgrades, accessories, or special features we should know about?

config.placeholder: e.g., Bimini top, upgraded stereo, GPS/fishfinder, custom cover, etc.
